title: OptiPVP
description: A 2 in 1 PVP and Optimization modpack which improves FPS and PVP client-side while keeping it vanilla.
body:
[![Swills](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModderZellior/Image/main/bannerofswills.jpg)](https://swills.gg/?ref=ZELLIOR)

![Here you can see some of the many features OptiPVP has. ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f5a9bdd57372a4a922cc84b6891ca51af0e3789.png)OptiPVP is a lightweight modpack focused on higher FPS, smoother performance, and simple PvP-oriented HUD upgrades. It keeps the vanilla feel but adds the sharpness and responsiveness essential for high-level PvP.

What does it add?

-Performance mods for better FPS, faster loading, and reduced stutter.

-PvP-focused HUD tools like an Armor HUD, status effect timer and saturation. 

Why should you use it?

-OptiPVP makes Minecraft faster and more readable during fights. 

-It's perfect for PvP players who want a smooth, optimized experience without unnecessary extras.

-The settings are customised for more FPS.

If you’re experiencing issues with the modpack —  feel free to ask for help in my Discord. You’re also welcome to join to share feedback or suggestions!

Before playing, make sure the keybinds don't overlap, because it may happen that some hotkeys dont work when you have custom keybinds for mace or crystal pvp.

Don't forget to enable all of the texture packs included in this modpack!

Since some versions are still in beta, they can crash. Please inform me as soon as possible so that I can fix it.
